name: Cream of Shallots Sauce - Great Chefs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the chopped shallots over medium heat until softened.
2. Add the white wine and lemon juice to the saucepan. Cook, stirring occasionally, until all of the liquid has evaporated.
3. Gradually whisk in the heavy cream into the saucepan, ensuring no lumps form.
4. Bring the mixture to a strong boil, continuing to whisk constantly.
5. Whisk in small pieces of butter until melted and fully incorporated into the sauce.
6. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Strain the sauce through a fine sieve into another pan if desired, and keep warm.
